title: MANDATE factions file (rules/factions.json)
description: Insurgent factions per DESIGN.md §2/§5. Composited factions closely modeled on real groups; `composite_of` is REQUIRED — the journalistic sourcing ships in the data itself (the in-game Sources screen reads it). Runtime fields (links) are engine-owned.

composite_of.description: Which real organizations this composite is modeled on, stated plainly (§2 framing).

sponsor.description: External sponsor id (patron archetype) or null; sponsors are a decisive survival variable (RAND, §17).

capability_tier.description: TTP tier (§5.2): 1 ambush/IED … 5 coordinated multi-region offensives. Static at v0.2; tier-ups land later.

relations.description: Affinity toward other faction ids, −1 (at war) to +1 (aligned); feeds link-formation threshold (§18.5).
